ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for departmental inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the entity */,
  "entity_head" TEXT /* Name of the entity head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for entity inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the entity */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_areas" (
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense area */,
  "expense_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the expense area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expense area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expense type */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the expense */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense area */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier involved */,
  "transaction_number" TEXT /* Unique transaction number */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the transaction */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was approved */,
  "reimbursable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense is reimbursable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the transaction */,
  "reimbursement_status" TEXT /* Status of the reimbursement */,
  "reimbursed_amount" REAL /* Amount reimbursed */,
  "reimbursed_date" TEXT /* Date the reimbursement was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance officer, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)
